results.rendered_html:
śraddhālu a. [śraddhā -āluc]
1 Believing, full of faith.
2 Desirous, longing or wishing for (anything); akālakusumasamudgamaśraddhālutā bhartrā  Ratn. 1. 
— luḥ f. A pregnant woman longing for anything.
